nasb.text: Thus says the Lord, “The people who survived the sword Found grace in the wilderness— Israel, when it went to find its rest.”

esv.text: Thus says the Lord: “The people who survived the sword found grace in the wilderness; when Israel sought for rest,

cnv.text: 耶和華這樣說： “在刀劍下倖存的人民， 在曠野蒙受了恩寵； 以色列來到她安息之處。”

ccb.text: “逃脱刀兵之灾的以色列人必在旷野蒙恩， 找到安息之所。 这是耶和华说的。”
